channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Amazon Alexa Plus can now create AI-generated podcasts
item.description: Alexa Plus, Amazon's upgraded AI assistant, can now generate podcasts on "virtually any topic," according to an announcement on Monday. With the update, Amazon says you can give Alexa Plus a...

item.title: Shipping AI Agents Like A Pro
item.description: Your agent works on your laptop. It plans a beautiful 4-day hiking trip with a fancy dinner, stays under budget, and nails the itinerary. You hit enter, lean back, and feel like a wizard. Now ship...

item.title: There's this thing in me pushing me to build a social media app. 😅 Basically a place where people can connect, be happy and be free.

item.title: The Verge’s 2026 college graduation gift guide

item.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
item.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

item.title: Linus Torvalds says Linux security list is becoming ‘unmanageable’ due to AI bug reports

item.title: Developer Workstations Are Now Part of the Software Supply Chain

item.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
item.description: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

item.title: Ivanti, Fortinet, SAP, VMware, n8n Patch RCE, SQL Injection, Privilege Escalation Flaws
item.description: Ivanti, Fortinet, n8n, SAP, and VMware have released security fixes for various vulnerabilities that could be exploited by bad actors to bypass authentication and execute arbitrary code. Topping...

item.title: I’m a Normie. Can Normies Really Vibe Code?
item.description: Apparently anyone can vibe code anything these days. So Claude and I tried to make a database for tracking the petty grievances of the masses.
